blog.subtitle: Stay up to date with the latest news and discover the best tourist attractions in the city.
blog.intro: Serra Negra brings together tours for all profiles: viewpoints and city icons — Alto da Serra, Cable Car to Christ the Redeemer and the replica of the Fontana di Trevi — and rural tourism experiences on farms open to visitation. There you can follow artisanal productions of wines and cachaças (Família Silotto), coffee from planting to roasting (Vale do Ouro Verde), cheeses made on the farm (Sítio Chapadão) and spirits and country sweets (Sítio Bom Retiro – Família Carra). Advance booking recommended.

contacts.whatsappMessage: Hello! I would like more information.

alto-da-serra.title: Alto da Serra (Serra Negra)
alto-da-serra.description: Prepare for a breathtaking view at Alto da Serra, the highest point in the region at 1,310m altitude! From there, you can contemplate one of the most beautiful landscapes in the Water Circuit, spotting more than 10 neighboring cities. Access is via Rua 14 de Julho. An unforgettable experience for those who love nature and photography!

fontana-di-trevi.title: Fontana Di Trevi - Serra Negra/SP
fontana-di-trevi.description: Be enchanted by the stunning replica of the Fontana di Trevi in Serra Negra! An unmissable tourist spot to take amazing photos and, of course, make that special wish by tossing a coin. Come and check out this architectural beauty that brings the charm of Italy to the interior of São Paulo. Visit and fall in love!

teleferico-cristo-redentor.title: Cable Car and Christ the Redeemer
teleferico-cristo-redentor.description: Climb Serra Negra in an exciting way! Take the Cable Car at Praça João Zelante and enjoy a ride with panoramic views of the city. It takes you directly to Christ the Redeemer at the top of Pico do Fonseca! From up there, the 18-meter statue welcomes you with a spectacular view, perfect for photos and moments of peace. It's the perfect combo of adventure and contemplation!

museu-vinho-cachaca-silotto.title: Wine and Cachaça Museum – Família Silotto
museu-vinho-cachaca-silotto.description:
Experience all the Italian tradition in the manufacture of artisanal drinks. Wines made with grapes grown on our property, in our over 100-year-old vineyard. Preserved environment, keeping the rustic traces of the past. Come and enjoy pleasant moments close to nature, tasting a good wine.
Products: artisanal wines, artisanal cachaça, grappa, wine vinegar, ground coffee, cheeses, sweets, honey and other farm products.
We also have a playground and farm animals.

vale-ouro-verde-museu-cafe.title: Vale do Ouro Verde – Coffee Museum
vale-ouro-verde-museu-cafe.description: Coffee production in Serra Negra is one of the main agricultural activities developed in the city. At Fazenda Vale do Ouro Verde, tourists can schedule a monitored visit and learn about the entire artisanal coffee production process, from evolution in planting forms to harvesting techniques, bean preparation, roasting and grinding. A small museum gathers the history of coffee, curiosities and virtues of the product, in addition to equipment and tools from the time.

sitio-bom-retiro-familia-carra.title: Sítio Bom Retiro – Família Carra – Wine and Spirit Production
sitio-bom-retiro-familia-carra.description: Situated among beautiful mountains, it brings together an artisanal production of tasty grape and orange wines, in addition to a variety of spirits, including several types of cachaça (white, aged, blue cachaça and distilled with orange blossoms), grappa, cognac and rum. The farm also produces molasses, rapadura, brown sugar and honey, in addition to growing fruit and exporting mangoes.

sitio-chapadao-queijos.title: Sítio Chapadão – Cheese Production
sitio-chapadao-queijos.description: The farm produces the best cheeses in the region, which bear the brand "Queijos da Fazenda". On site, visitors will have the opportunity to witness the entire production process, from milking in the corral to tasting the final product, among fresh cheese, milk ricotta and seasoned ricotta, semi-cured cheese and curd.

trenzinho-maria-fumaca.title: Maria Fumaça and Tia Linda Train
trenzinho-maria-fumaca.description: Embark on this adventure! The Traditional Train tour is an unmissable tourist attraction for the whole family since 1991! It is an eight-kilometer route, passing through the city center and lasting an average of fifty minutes. It follows the city's main tourist spots and makes a 10-minute scheduled stop at Parque Fontes Santo Agostinho and Santa Luzia. Make the most of this delicious tour with relaxation and leisure. Departure in front of the Bus Station.

fazenda-benedetti.title: Fazenda Benedetti
fazenda-benedetti.description: Fazenda Benedetti is located between Serra Negra and Amparo, in the Circuito das Águas Paulista, offering authentic rural leisure experiences, artisanal products and contact with nature. With over 90 years of tradition, it produces award-winning cachaças, liqueurs, wines, honey and artisanal bakery delights. The space has an emporium, cafeteria, panetteria, apiary and online store, highlighting quality, history and welcoming service. Ideal for families to enjoy special moments, tasting coffee and fresh products in the midst of nature. Come and meet and fall in love with the Benedetti tradition!

about.title: About Radio Hotel
about.description1: Located in the heart of Serra Negra, Radio Hotel combines tradition and elegance in a unique environment, surrounded by the lush nature of the Serra da Mantiqueira.
about.description2: We offer an authentic hospitality experience, with every detail designed to provide unforgettable moments for our guests.
about.anniversaryNote: The name ‘Radio’ comes from Serra Negra’s famous radioactive waters, recognized for their therapeutic properties.

standard.name: Standard Room
standard.description: Standard apartments are internal or street-facing and feature thermo-acoustic windows (German technology), minibar, telephone and air conditioning, ensuring comfort and silence.

luxury.name: Special Master Suite
luxury.description: Luxury apartments are 8 m² larger than the Standard ones, facing the pool, equipped with minibar, telephone and air conditioning. They have anti-allergic flooring for greater well-being.

events.title: Conventions
events.subtitle: Unforgettable Moments in a Unique Setting
events.description: Realize your dream event in our elegant spaces, surrounded by nature.

planning.title: Personalized Planning
planning.description: Our specialized team takes care of every detail of your event, from planning to execution, ensuring everything is perfect.

convention.title: Convention Center
convention.description: The Radio Hotel Convention Center has a 5-meter ceiling height and two equipped rooms. We have the Sala Milenium, with a capacity for up to 300 people in auditorium format, and the Sala Monterrey, with a capacity for up to 60 people in auditorium format. The rooms are air-conditioned and equipped with Wi-Fi. Consult us to learn more about how we can contribute to your event.
